pieces:
FOR answer IN answers
	score += answer.points
END FOR

IF score in range1 THEN DISPLAY `Title A`
ELSE IF score in range2 THEN DISPLAY `Title B`
ELSE DISPLAY `Title C`
message: This code takes all the answers you gave in a quiz and adds up their points to get your total score. Then, it checks which score range your total falls into and shows the title that matches your score. Basically, it tells you your result based on how well you answered.
